optimizations: Optimize part design for easier machining by increasing wall thickness and reducing complexity. ($3 savings)
Consider using a more cost-effective material or alternative manufacturing process (e.g., 3D printing) if the carbon fibre is not critical to the part's function. ($10 savings)
risks: Thin walls (5 mm) may require specialized tooling or machining techniques.
Carbon fibre material is prone to delamination, which could increase costs due to rework or scrap rates.
